2604.23257.title: Knowledge Lever Risk Management for Software Engineering: A Stochastic Framework for Mitigating Knowledge Loss
2604.23257.paper_summary:
Software engineering (SE) organizations operate in a knowledge-intensive domain where critical assets -- architectural expertise, design rationale, and system intuition -- are overwhelmingly tacit and volatile. The departure of key contributors or the decay of undocumented decisions can severely impair project velocity and software quality. While conventional SE risk management optimized for schedule and budget is common, the intangible knowledge risks that determine project success remain under-represented.
  The goal of this research work is to propose and evaluate the Knowledge Lever Risk Management (KLRM) Framework, designed specifically for the software development lifecycle. The primary objectives are to: (1) recast intangible knowledge assets as active mechanisms for risk mitigation (Knowledge Levers); (2) integrate these levers into a structured four-phase architecture (Audit, Alignment, Activation, Assurance); and (3) provide a formal stochastic model to quantify the impact of lever activation on project knowledge capital. We detail the application of these levers through software-specific practices such as pair programming, architectural decision records (ADRs), and LLM-assisted development. Stochastic Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that full lever activation increases expected knowledge capital by 63.8\% and virtually eliminates knowledge crisis probability. Our research shows that knowledge lever activation improves alignment across the project management iron triangle (scope, time, cost) by reducing rework and rediscovery costs.
2604.23257.paper_summary_zh:
軟體工程（SE）組織在一個知識密集的領域中運作，其中關鍵資產——架構專業知識、設計理由和系統直覺——大多是隱性且不穩定的。關鍵貢獻者的離開或未記錄決策的衰退可能會嚴重損害專案的速度和軟體質量。雖然針對時間表和預算的傳統SE風險管理很常見，但決定專案成功的無形知識風險仍然被低估。<lb/>  
本研究工作的目標是提出並評估知識槓桿風險管理（KLRM）框架，專門為軟體開發生命週期設計。主要目標是：(1) 將無形知識資產重新定義為風險緩解的主動機制（知識槓桿）；(2) 將這些槓桿整合到一個結構化的四階段架構中（審核、對齊、啟動、保證）；以及 (3) 提供一個正式的隨機模型來量化槓桿啟動對專案知識資本的影響。我們通過特定於軟體的實踐，如結對程式設計、架構決策記錄（ADR）和LLM輔助開發，詳細說明了這些槓桿的應用。隨機蒙地卡羅模擬顯示，完全啟動槓桿可將預期知識資本增加63.8\%，並幾乎消除知識危機的概率。我們的研究表明，知識槓桿的啟動通過減少返工和重新發現的成本，改善了專案管理鐵三角（範圍、時間、成本）之間的對齊。
2604.23257.author: Mark Chua et.al.
